title: Matrix Channel Config
description: Configuration for the Matrix channel adapter. Connects to a Matrix homeserver via the Client-Server API using an access token. NOTE: This is a send-only MVP; inbound poll via /sync is deferred to v0.8.3.

homeserver_url.description: Full HTTPS URL of the Matrix homeserver (e.g. https://matrix.org).

credential_handle_access_token.description: Credentials-store key for the Matrix access token.

user_id.description: Full Matrix user ID of the bot (e.g. @bot:matrix.org).
